login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in with a login link – no password needed.
login.error: Couldn't send the link. Please try again.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Enter your email – we'll send you a login link. You'll set up your name and profile afterwards.

sent.title: Email on its way
sent.body: We've sent a login link to {{email}}. Open it on this device to sign in. The link is valid for 15 minutes.

verify.title: Signing you in…
verify.subtitle: One moment, we're signing you in.
verify.errorSubtitle: This login link is invalid or has expired.
verify.hint: Login links are valid once and for 15 minutes only. Just request a new one.

scan.title: Join a community
scan.subtitle: Scan the QR code or enter the code
scan.intro: Point the camera at the QR code you find on site – or type in the 8-digit code manually. You'll only be matched within your community.
scan.errorNotFound: Not a valid community code. Check the digits and try again.
scan.confirmFirst: Next you'll pick what you're looking for.
scan.cameraError: Camera unavailable. Allow access or enter the code manually.

linkedin.title: Connect LinkedIn
linkedin.subtitle: Get started faster – optional
linkedin.pitch: Connect your LinkedIn profile and we'll suggest matching skills and "looking for" topics right away. You can also skip this and pick everything yourself.
linkedin.consent: I agree that my public LinkedIn profile is read, processed and stored to improve my matches.
linkedin.errorUnavailable: The LinkedIn import is currently unavailable. You can still continue and pick your skills yourself.
linkedin.errorFetch: We couldn't load your LinkedIn profile. Check your URL (e.g. linkedin.com/in/yourname) and try again – or continue without LinkedIn.
linkedin.errorInvalidUrl: Please enter a valid LinkedIn URL (e.g. linkedin.com/in/yourname).

skills.title: Your skills
skills.subtitle: What are you looking for – what can you offer?
skills.analyzing: AI is reading your LinkedIn profile and suggesting matching skills…
skills.customSeekPlaceholder: Add your own – what are you looking for?
skills.customOfferPlaceholder: Add your own – what can you offer?
skills.suggestionHint: The marked chips come from your LinkedIn profile – feel free to adjust them.

matches.title: Your matches
matches.incoming_one: {{count}} new request is waiting for you.
matches.incoming_other: {{count}} new requests are waiting for you.
matches.errorBody: The connection to the API failed. Check your internet connection and try again later.
matches.emptyBody: As soon as more people in your community add their skills, your best matches will show up here.

matchDetail.hiddenHint: Name and photo become visible once you're connected.
matchDetail.afterConnectBody: Once you're connected, you can get in touch right here (chat/contact details – coming in v0.2).

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.bioPlaceholder: A few sentences about you – visible on your match detail page.
profile.poolHint: Your matches are pooled from all your communities.
profile.linkedinConsent: I agree that my public LinkedIn profile is read, processed and stored.
profile.linkedinSuccess: Profile imported successfully. Your skill suggestions will be regenerated.
profile.linkedinDisabled: URL saved – the profile import is currently disabled.
profile.linkedinFetchFailed: URL saved, but the profile couldn't be read. Please check the URL and try again.
profile.linkedinInvalid: Please enter a valid LinkedIn URL.
